text.title: Product Explainability (PM Angle) Examples
text.summary: Worked end-to-end example showing the methodology applied on a representative case.

example.title: Mobile checkout redesign narrative with derived audience renders
example.code: narrative_id: checkout-redesign-2026q2 problem: Users abandon checkout when payment options scroll below the fold on mobile. who: Mobile shoppers on small Android devices (segment: smb-prosumer). behaviour_change: Shoppers see and select preferred payment method without scrolling. outcome_metric: metric: mobile_checkout_completion_rate baseline: 62% target: 78% evidence_link: ../research/2026-04-mobile-checkout-sessions.md ninety_second_test_passed: true audience_renders: exec: "Re-laid out mobile checkout; 62%->78%, $1.2M ARR uplift est." sales: "New mobile checkout converts 16pp better; pitch with screenshots in deck v17." support: "When customers ask about new checkout, point them at help-article-1421." customer: "Faster checkout on phone: see and pick your card in one tap."
example.note: Illustrates one-canonical-narrative + audience-render-derived + evidence-link-required + ninety-second-test-passed + outcome-not-feature.

example.title: Three independent versions with feature-as-outcome
example.code: narrative_id: n1 problem: stuff who: x behaviour_change: we added button outcome_metric: {metric: DAU} evidence_link: "" audience_renders: {}
